home.testimonialsSubtitle: Real stories from people who used ConnectMyTask to get important work done.

testimonials.name: Sarah Jenkins
testimonials.quote: I needed a complex website built in under a week. I posted the task and found an amazing developer within hours. ConnectMyTask saved my project!

testimonials.name: Michael Lee
testimonials.quote: We had a long list of repairs after moving in. Within a day we had reliable pros booked for plumbing, electrical, and painting. It was surprisingly easy.

testimonials.name: Amira Patel
testimonials.quote: Between work and family I had no time for errands. Delivery and cleaning providers from ConnectMyTask helped me free up my weekends again.

testimonials.name: Daniel Rodriguez
testimonials.quote: ConnectMyTask brings me a steady stream of quality clients. The rating system and secure payments make it easy to focus on great work.

home.ctaTitle: Ready to get your to-do list done?

howItWorks.title: Get your to-do list done in 4 easy steps
howItWorks.subtitle: ConnectMyTask makes it simple to find reliable help for any project. Here's how to get started.

steps.title: Post a Task
steps.description: Tell us what you need done. Be specific about the details, budget, and timeline.

steps.title: Review Offers
steps.description: Receive competitive offers from verified Taskers. Check their profiles and reviews.

steps.title: Choose the Best
steps.description: Select the Tasker that fits your needs. Chat with them to clarify details.

steps.title: Get it Done
steps.description: The Tasker completes the job. Release payment only when you're 100% satisfied.

hero.title: Empowering Communities, One Task at a Time
hero.subtitle: ConnectMyTask is on a mission to simplify your life by connecting you with trusted, verified local experts for any task. We believe everyone deserves access to quality services and the freedom to focus on what truly matters.

mission.title: Making Life Easier Through Connection
mission.paragraph1: Our mission is to create a world where getting help is as easy as asking for it. We connect people who need tasks done with skilled, verified providers who can deliver exceptional service.
mission.paragraph2: By leveraging technology and fostering trust, we're building communities where everyone can thrive—whether you're seeking help or offering your expertise.

timeline.title: Building the Future of Work
timeline.subtitle: From a simple idea to a global platform serving hundreds of thousands

items.title: Future Forward

leakyFaucet.description: I have a leaking kitchen faucet that needs to be fixed. The faucet drips constantly and the handle is loose.

mountTv.description: Need help mounting a 55-inch TV on a plaster wall. I have the wall mount bracket already.

installFan.label: Install ceiling fan

hero.title: Get in Touch
hero.subtitle: Have questions? We're here to help. Send us a message and we'll respond as soon as possible.

message.label: Message
message.placeholder: Please provide details about your inquiry...

status.success: Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
status.error: Failed to send message. Please try again.
status.neutral: We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

items.question: How quickly will I get a response?
items.answer: We aim to respond to all inquiries within 24 hours during business days. Urgent safety issues are handled immediately.

items.question: Can I schedule a call with support?
items.answer: Yes. Choose "Support" and include your preferred time in the message. We'll confirm a time that works.

items.question: Do you offer phone support?
items.answer: Phone support is available Monday–Friday, 9am–6pm BST. For urgent issues outside these hours, please use our 24/7 live chat or emergency line.

support.title: We're Here to Help
support.subtitle: Our dedicated support team is passionate about ensuring you have the best experience possible. Whether you have a question, need technical help, or want to provide feedback, we're here for you.
support.imageAlt: Headset and laptop ready for support call

hero.title: Trust & Safety
hero.subtitle: Your safety is our top priority. We've built a multi-layered safety system to ensure every task is secure, transparent, and trustworthy.

safetyFirst.title: How We Keep You Safe
safetyFirst.subtitle: Multiple layers of protection work together to create a safe, trusted environment.

safetyFeatures.title: Identity Verification
safetyFeatures.description: Every Tasker on our platform undergoes a rigorous identity verification process. We check government IDs and perform background checks where applicable to ensure you're working with real, trusted people.

safetyFeatures.title: Secure Payments
safetyFeatures.description: Your money is safe with us. We hold payments in a secure escrow account until the task is completed to your satisfaction. Payments are processed through industry-leading encrypted gateways.

safetyFeatures.title: Community Reviews
safetyFeatures.description: Our transparent review system allows you to see feedback from previous customers before you hire. Taskers are rated on communication, quality, and reliability.

safetyFeatures.title: 24/7 Support
safetyFeatures.description: Our dedicated support team is available around the clock to assist with any issues or disputes. We're here to help you resolve problems quickly and fairly.

verification.title: Rigorous Provider Screening
verification.subtitle: Every service provider goes through our comprehensive 4-step verification process before they can accept tasks on our platform.

steps.title: ID Verification
steps.description: All providers must submit government-issued photo identification for verification.

steps.title: Background Checks
steps.description: We conduct comprehensive background checks including criminal records and employment history.

steps.title: Skill Assessment
steps.description: Providers must demonstrate their expertise through portfolio reviews and skill tests.

steps.title: Ongoing Monitoring
steps.description: We continuously monitor provider performance and conduct periodic re-verification.

bestPractices.title: Stay Safe on the Platform
bestPractices.subtitle: Follow these guidelines to ensure a safe and positive experience.

items.title: Communicate on Platform
items.description: Keep all communications within the platform to maintain a record and ensure accountability.

items.title: Review Profiles Carefully
items.description: Check ratings, reviews, and verification badges before hiring a provider.

items.title: Report Suspicious Activity
items.description: If something doesn't feel right, report it immediately to our Trust & Safety team.

items.title: Confirm Task Details
items.description: Always confirm scope, timeline, and pricing before starting any work.

coverage.title: Comprehensive Coverage
coverage.subtitle: We provide multiple layers of protection to give you peace of mind.

items.title: ConnectMyTask Guarantee
items.description: Your satisfaction is guaranteed or your money back.

items.title: Liability Coverage
items.description: All tasks are covered by our comprehensive insurance policy.

items.title: Dispute Resolution
items.description: Fair mediation process for any disagreements.

items.title: Secure Payment Hold
items.description: Payments released only when you approve the completed work.

cta.title: Need Help? We're Here 24/7
cta.subtitle: Our dedicated Trust & Safety team is always available to assist you.

notice.title: Important Notice
notice.body: Please read these Terms of Service carefully before using ConnectMyTask. By using our platform, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our service.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.body: By accessing and using ConnectMyTask ("the Platform", "we", "us", or "our"), you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provisions of this agreement. If you do not agree to abide by the above, please do not use this service.

description.title: 2. Description of Service
description.body: ConnectMyTask is a platform that connects users looking for services ("Customers" or "Users") with independent service providers ("Taskers" or "Providers"). We do not provide the services ourselves; we provide the platform for connection, matching, and transaction facilitation between Customers and Taskers.

items.title: 3.1 Account Creation
items.body: You must create an account to use certain features of our Platform. You agree to provide accurate, current, and complete information during the registration process and to update such information to keep it accurate, current, and complete.

items.title: 3.2 Account Security
items.body: You are responsible for safeguarding the password you use to access the Platform and for any activities or actions under your password. You agree not to disclose your password to any third party and must notify us immediately upon becoming aware of any breach of security or unauthorized use of your account.

items.title: 3.3 Age Requirement
items.body: You must be at least 18 years of age to use this Platform. By using the Platform, you represent and warrant that you meet this age requirement.

items.title: 4.1 Prohibited Activities
bullets: (a) Use the Platform for any unlawful purpose or in violation of any applicable laws of Bangladesh or other applicable jurisdictions.
(b) Violate or encourage others to violate the rights of third parties.
(c) Post, upload, or distribute any content that is defamatory, obscene, threatening, or hateful.
(d) Use the Platform to transmit any computer viruses or malicious code.
(e) Attempt to interfere with the proper functioning of the Platform.
(f) Create multiple accounts or fake accounts.

items.title: 4.2 Content Guidelines
items.body: You are solely responsible for all content you post on the Platform. You agree that your content will not contain material that is copyrighted, trademarked, or otherwise violates intellectual property rights unless you own such rights or have permission from the rightful owner.

items.title: 4.3 Independent Contractor Relationship
items.body: Taskers are independent contractors and not employees of ConnectMyTask. The Platform does not employ any Taskers nor is it responsible for their actions or inactions.

items.title: 5.1 Service Fees
items.body: ConnectMyTask charges service fees for the use of the Platform. These fees are clearly displayed before you confirm any transaction. Service fees may vary based on the category of service, location, and other factors.

items.title: 5.2 Payment Processing
items.body: Payments are processed securely through our third-party payment processor. You agree to pay all fees and charges associated with the tasks you book. All payments must be made through the Platform unless otherwise agreed in writing by ConnectMyTask.

items.title: 5.3 Cancellation and Refunds
items.body: Cancellation policies vary by service type. Customers may be charged a cancellation fee if they cancel within the specified cancellation window. Refunds are processed according to our refund policy and at our sole discretion.

items.title: 5.4 Disputes
items.body: If you have a dispute regarding a charge, you must notify us within 30 days of the charge. We will work with you and the Tasker to resolve the dispute fairly.

verification.title: 6. Tasker Verification and Background Checks
verification.body: We perform identity verification and background checks on Taskers to promote trust and safety. However, we do not guarantee the accuracy or completeness of such checks, nor do we warrant that all Taskers are trustworthy or qualified. You acknowledge that you use the services at your own risk.

items.title: 7.1 Platform Disclaimer
items.body: The Platform is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied, including but not limited to implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement.

items.title: 7.2 Limitation of Liability
items.body: ConnectMyTask is not responsible for the conduct of any User or Tasker, whether online or offline. You use the service at your own risk. To the maximum extent permitted by the laws of Bangladesh, ConnectMyTask shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising out of or related to your use of the Platform.

items.title: 7.3 Service Guarantee
items.body: While we strive to facilitate quality connections, we do not guarantee the quality, safety, or legality of services provided by Taskers. We do not guarantee the ability of Customers to pay for services.

items.title: 7.4 Insurance
items.body: Taskers are advised to maintain appropriate insurance for their services. ConnectMyTask may provide limited liability coverage for certain tasks; such coverage has exclusions and limitations as detailed in our insurance policy documentation.

ip.title: 8. Intellectual Property
ip.body: All content on the Platform, including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, images, software, and data compilations, is the property of ConnectMyTask or its content suppliers and is protected by copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, modify, or create derivative works of our content without our express written permission.

privacy.title: 9. Privacy and Data Protection
privacy.body: Your use of the Platform is subject to our Privacy Policy, which is incorporated into these Terms by reference. Please review our Privacy Policy to understand how we collect, use, and share your personal information in compliance with applicable data protection laws in Bangladesh.

items.title: 10.1 Termination by Us
items.body: We reserve the right to terminate or suspend your account and access to the Platform at our sole discretion, without notice, for conduct that we believe violates these Terms, is harmful to other users, us, or third parties, or for any other reason.

items.title: 10.2 Effect of Termination
items.body: Upon termination, your right to use the Platform will immediately cease. All provisions of these Terms that by their nature should survive termination shall survive, including ownership provisions, warranty disclaimers, and limitations of liability.

items.title: 10.3 Termination by You
items.body: You may terminate your account at any time by contacting our support team. You will remain liable for any fees or charges incurred prior to termination.

indemnification.title: 11. Indemnification
indemnification.body: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless ConnectMyTask and its officers, directors, employees, contractors, agents, licensors, and suppliers from and against any claims, liabilities, damages, judgments, awards, losses, costs, expenses, or fees (including reasonable legal fees) arising from your violation of these Terms or your use of the Platform.

items.title: 12.1 Informal Resolution
items.body: In the event of any controversy or claim relating to these Terms, the parties will first consult and negotiate in good faith to reach a satisfactory solution.

items.title: 12.2 Binding Arbitration
items.body: If a settlement is not reached within 30 days, any unresolved controversy or claim shall be settled by binding arbitration in accordance with the rules of the Bangladesh International Arbitration Centre (BIAC) or such other arbitration body as may be applicable in Bangladesh. The arbitration shall be conducted in Dhaka, Bangladesh.

items.title: 12.3 Class Action Waiver
items.body: You agree that any arbitration or proceeding shall be limited to disputes between you and ConnectMyTask individually. You waive any right to participate in a class action lawsuit or class-wide arbitration.

governing.title: 13. Governing Law
governing.body: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the People's Republic of Bangladesh, without regard to its conflict of law provisions. You agree to submit to the personal and exclusive jurisdiction of the courts located in Dhaka, Bangladesh.

changes.title: 14. Changes to Terms
changes.body: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will notify you of material changes by posting the new Terms on the Platform and updating the "Last updated" date. Your continued use of the Platform after such changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.

items.title: 15.1 Entire Agreement
items.body: These Terms constitute the entire agreement between you and ConnectMyTask regarding the use of the Platform and supersede all prior agreements and understandings.

items.title: 15.2 Severability
items.body: If any provision of these Terms is found to be unenforceable or invalid, that provision shall be limited or eliminated to the minimum extent necessary so that these Terms shall otherwise remain in full force and effect.

items.title: 15.3 Waiver
items.body: No waiver of any term shall be deemed a further or continuing waiver of such term or any other term. Our failure to assert any right or provision under these Terms shall not constitute a waiver of such right or provision.

items.title: 15.4 Assignment
items.body: You may not assign or transfer these Terms or your rights hereunder, in whole or in part, without our prior written consent. We may assign these Terms at any time without notice.

contact.title: 16. Contact Information
contact.body: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at: legal@connectmytask.com or ConnectMyTask Legal Department, Gulshan 1, Dhaka 1212, Bangladesh.

bottom.prompt: Have questions about our Terms of Service?

items.description: We never sell your personal data to third parties

bullets.label: Account Information
bullets.text: Name, email address, phone number, password, and profile photo.

bullets.label: Profile Information
bullets.text: Bio, skills, certifications, work history (for Taskers).

bullets.label: Payment Information
bullets.text: Credit/debit card details, billing address, and payment history.

bullets.label: Task Information
bullets.text: Task descriptions, locations, photos, and related communications.

bullets.label: Identity Verification
bullets.text: Government-issued ID and background check information (for Taskers).

bullets.label: Communications
bullets.text: Messages sent through our platform and customer support inquiries.

bullets.label: Device Information
bullets.text: IP address, browser type, operating system, and device identifiers.

bullets.label: Usage Data
bullets.text: Pages visited, features used, time spent on the platform, and clicks.

bullets.label: Location Data
bullets.text: Approximate or precise location (with your permission).

bullets.label: Cookies and Similar Technologies
bullets.text: As described in our Cookie Policy.

sub3.title: 1.3 Information From Third Parties
bullets: Social media platforms (if you choose to connect your account).

sub1.title: 2.1 To Provide Our Services
bullets: Provide customer support and respond to requests.

sub2.title: 2.2 To Improve and Develop Our Platform

sub3.title: 2.3 For Safety and Security
bullets: Detect and prevent fraud, spam, and abuse.
Enforce our Terms of Service and other policies.
Protect our legal rights and comply with obligations.

sub4.title: 2.4 For Marketing and Communications
bullets: Send promotional emails and in-app messages (you can opt out).
Personalise your experience and show relevant content.

items.title: 3.1 With Other Users
items.body: When you book or offer a task, we share relevant information with the other party, including name, photo, ratings, reviews, and contact information necessary to complete the task.

items.title: 3.2 With Service Providers
items.body: We share information with third-party service providers who help us operate our platform, including payment processors, cloud hosting providers, analytics providers, customer support tools, and marketing platforms.

items.title: 3.3 For Legal Reasons
items.body: We may disclose your information if required by law, court order, or government request, or if we believe disclosure is necessary to protect our rights, your safety, or the safety of others.

items.title: 3.4 Business Transfers
items.body: If ConnectMyTask is involved in a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets, your information may be transferred as part of that transaction. We will notify you before your information becomes subject to a different privacy policy.

items.title: 3.5 With Your Consent
items.body: We may share your information with third parties when you explicitly consent to such sharing.

items.title: 4.1 Access and Portability
items.body: You have the right to access the personal information we hold about you and to receive a copy of your data in a portable format, subject to applicable law in Bangladesh.

items.title: 4.2 Correction and Update
items.body: You can update your account information at any time through your profile settings. If you notice any inaccuracies, please contact us so we can correct them.

items.title: 4.3 Deletion
items.body: You may request deletion of your account and personal information. We may retain certain information as required by law or for legitimate business purposes.

items.title: 4.4 Marketing Opt-Out
items.body: You can opt out of marketing emails by clicking the unsubscribe link in any promotional email or by adjusting your notification preferences in your account settings.

items.title: 4.5 Cookie Controls
items.body: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Note that disabling certain cookies may affect platform functionality.

items.title: 4.6 Location Data
items.body: You can enable or disable location services through your device settings. Some features may not function properly without location access.

items.title: 5.1 Security Measures
items.body: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information, including encryption, secure servers, firewalls, and access controls. Payment information is processed using PCI-DSS compliant payment processors.

items.title: 5.2 Data Retention
items.body: We retain your personal information for as long as necessary to provide our services, comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce our agreements. After account deletion, we may retain limited information in anonymised or aggregated form.

items.title: 5.3 Security Limitations
items.body: While we strive to protect your information, no security system is impenetrable. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials.

children.title: 6. Children's Privacy
children.body: Our platform is not intended for children under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe we have collected information from a child, please contact us immediately so we can take appropriate action.

transfers.title: 7. International Data Transfers
transfers.body: Your information may be transferred to and processed in countries other than your country of residence. These countries may have different data protection laws. Where required, we take appropriate safeguards to protect your information in line with the laws of Bangladesh.

sub1.title: 8.1 Types of Cookies We Use
bullets: Essential cookies: Required for basic platform functionality.
Performance cookies: Help us understand how you use our platform.
Functionality cookies: Remember your preferences and settings.

sub2.title: 8.2 Third-Party Tracking
sub2.body: We use third-party analytics and advertising services that may collect information about your online activities over time and across different websites.

localRights.title: 9. Your Rights Under Local Laws
localRights.body: Depending on where you live, you may have additional rights under local data protection laws. We will honour these rights in accordance with the laws of the People's Republic of Bangladesh and any other applicable regulations.

changes.title: 10. Changes to This Privacy Policy
changes.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or for legal, regulatory, or operational reasons. We will notify you of material changes by posting the updated policy on our platform and updating the "Last updated" date at the top of this page. Your continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

contact.title: 11. Contact Us
contact.body: If you have questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or our privacy practices, please contact us at:

details.address: ConnectMyTask Privacy Team, Gulshan 1, Dhaka 1212, Bangladesh

default.title: Checking payment

checking.title: Checking payment
checking.body: We are confirming your payment status.

processing.title: Payment is processing
processing.body: We are still confirming your payment. This page will update shortly.

success.title: Payment successful
success.body: Your payment has been confirmed. Thank you!

failed.title: Payment failed
failed.body: Your payment could not be confirmed. Please try again or contact support.

cancelled.title: Payment cancelled
cancelled.body: You cancelled the payment. You can try again anytime.

refunded.title: Payment refunded
refunded.body: This payment has been refunded. If you have questions, contact support.

missing.title: Missing transaction
missing.body: We couldn't find a payment to verify. Please start the payment again.

error.title: Verification error
error.body: We could not verify your payment right now. Please try again.

paymentReturn.processingHint: This can take a minute. We will keep checking.
